trends.summary: 公开来源显示该议题正在发酵：Four arrests after Edgware Road incidents, say police Teenager dies in France while celebrating team’s win A police officer has been hurt and several people were arrested after disorder in L...
trends.summaryZh: 中文翻译：Edgware Road事件发生后，四人被捕，称法国警察青少年在庆祝球队获胜时死亡。一名警察受伤，几人在骚乱后被捕。
trends.operation: 把热点改写成社区问题、经验征集或实用清单。适合长帖、群组讨论和 Reels 二次分发。
